# Harmilap Singh Dhaliwal

> AI & Data Science Lead. ~8 years of progressive AI/ML — from industrial
> Digital Twins to bank-wide production agentic AI and multi-stage LLM
> analytics platforms in regulated finance.

## Start here

- [Home](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/): Positioning, career arc, project index.
- [Resume](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/resume): Career arc, skills, education, awards, writing.
- [Projects](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/projects): Case studies with architecture diagrams.
- [Writings](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/blog): Technical whitepapers and practitioner deep-dives.
- [Papers](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/papers): Long-form papers.
- [Platform](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/platform): How production AI is built and served.
- [About](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/about): Thesis and background.

## Project case studies

- [PAR Assist](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/projects/par-assist): Bank-wide production agentic AI platform.
- [Astraeus](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/projects/astraeus): LLM-as-router analytics platform over financial hierarchies.
- [Aegis](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/projects/aegis): NL→SQL benchmarking system.
- [Commodity Tax](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/projects/commodity-tax): Months → 90 minutes process automation.
- [Document Intelligence](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/projects/document-intelligence): Document AI extraction pipeline.
- [Combustion Tuning](https://rogerthatroach.github.io/projects/combustion-tuning): Industrial Digital Twin, $3M/yr savings.
